summary: Comprehensive testing of 5 new Hotel PMS features completed. All backend APIs (19/19 tests passed) and frontend pages are working correctly. Features tested: Housekeeping Status Management, Wake-up Call Management, Lost & Found Module, Invoice Settings, PDF Invoice, and Group Folio Merging.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - minor accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about missing Description in Dialog components could be addressed for better accessibility
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed data for wake-up calls and lost & found items
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features for Hotel PMS are fully functional. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_hotel_services_api.py cover all CRUD operations. Frontend pages accessible at /housekeeping-status, /wake-up-calls, /lost-found, /group-folio, and /app/settings (Invoice Settings tab). PDF Fatura button is in ReservationDetailModal's Folyolar tab.

ui_elements: Status update buttons on each room card
Dialog has room, time, date, save fields
PDF Fatura button visible in Folyolar tab of ReservationDetailModal
